*Summary:* 20 issues found · Critical: 6 · Moderate: 7 · Trivial: 5 · Noise: 2
*Tickets:* 5 new created · 0 duplicates skipped · 0 auto-resolved
*Incident mode:* No (20 issues, at cap)

🔴 *CRITICAL — brand_images table missing in production schema*
<https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-3J|FORMORIA-3J> · <https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-1J|1J> · <https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-2E|2E> · <https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-1B|1B> · <https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-W|W> · <https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-1C|1C> · <https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-2H|2H>
Events: 14 · New (first seen 18h ago) · Severity: Critical
PGRST205: `brand_images` table not in Supabase schema cache — migration `20260708100000_brand_images.sql` from DEV-959/PR#276 has not been applied to production. Brand detail pages and dashboard throwing 500s.
Validation: *still_present* — migration file exists in codebase, table absent from production DB
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-963/apply-brand-images-migration-table-missing-in-production-schema-cache|DEV-963> — Apply brand_images migration · Priority: Urgent · Labels: Bug, L

🔴 *CRITICAL — ReferenceError: resolvedSearchParams not defined on dashboard*
<https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-3A|FORMORIA-3A> · <https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-3B|FORMORIA-3B>
Events: 5 · New (first seen 17h ago) · Severity: Critical
`ReferenceError: resolvedSearchParams is not defined` on `GET /[locale]/dashboard` — dashboard unavailable for affected users. Current code appears to guard correctly; may be from a deploy window before the fix landed.
Validation: *inconclusive* — code defines variable at page.tsx:88 and layout.tsx:29 but runtime error still unresolved in Sentry
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-964/fix-referenceerror-resolvedsearchparams-not-defined-on-dashboard|DEV-964> — Fix ReferenceError: resolvedSearchParams · Priority: Urgent · Labels: Bug, L

🟡 *MODERATE — Next.js/Turbopack build compilation errors in brand dashboard routes*
<https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-3H|FORMORIA-3H> (11 evt) · <https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-3G|FORMORIA-3G> (4) · <https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-38|FORMORIA-38> (4) · <https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-3F|FORMORIA-3F> (1) · <https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-N|FORMORIA-N> (1)
Events: 21 · New · Severity: Moderate
Module compilation errors at `/_error` across brand dashboard routes — `zh-TW.json:1069:5`, `brands/[slug]/page.tsx:13:1`, `brands/[slug]/edit/page.tsx:9:1`, lucide-react CircleAlert, Next.js layout-router. All aligned with DEV-959 enrichment revamp deploy window. Errors subsiding — confirm they don't recur on next deploy.
Validation: *inconclusive* — source files exist and appear structurally correct; Turbopack compile-window transients cannot be ruled out
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-965/investigate-nextjsturbopack-build-compilation-errors-in-brand|DEV-965> — Investigate build compilation errors · Priority: High · Labels: Bug, M

⚪ *TRIVIAL — ReferenceError: DirtyFieldsContext not defined on brand edit page*
<https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-3E|FORMORIA-3E>
Events: 1 · New (first seen 16h ago) · Severity: Trivial
Brand edit wizard crashes with `ReferenceError: DirtyFieldsContext is not defined`. Context is correctly defined and imported — likely a Turbopack SSR bundling transient from the same deploy window.
Validation: *inconclusive* — context exported at dirty-fields-context.tsx:9 and imported at brand-edit-wizard.tsx:22; no structural code defect found
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-966/fix-referenceerror-dirtyfieldscontext-not-defined-on-brand-edit-page|DEV-966> — Fix DirtyFieldsContext ReferenceError · Priority: Normal · Labels: Bug, S

⚪ *TRIVIAL — Hydration mismatches and hooks violation on dashboard brand pages*
<https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-3C|FORMORIA-3C> · <https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-13|FORMORIA-13> · <https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-3K|FORMORIA-3K>
Events: 3 · Mixed new/recurring · Severity: Trivial
Hydration mismatches on brand edit page and dashboard brand detail, plus one hooks-violation error (`Rendered more hooks than during the previous render`). Audit brand dashboard client components for browser-API reads outside `useEffect` and conditional hook calls in wizard step children.
Validation: *inconclusive* — no obvious browser-API misuse found in wizard top-level code; child components not fully audited
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-967/fix-hydration-mismatches-and-hooks-violation-on-dashboard-brand-pages|DEV-967> — Fix hydration mismatches and hooks violation · Priority: Normal · Labels: Bug, S

*🔕 Noise — No ticket (2 issues):*
- <https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-3D|FORMORIA-3D>: Hydration Error — culprit is `http://localhost:3000/` (dev environment, not production)
- <https://formoria.sentry.io/issues/FORMORIA-39|FORMORIA-39>: Internal Next.js Router action dispatched before initialization — 1 event, known framework race condition, no escalating trend

*Tickets Created (5):*
- <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-963/apply-brand-images-migration-table-missing-in-production-schema-cache|DEV-963> — Apply brand_images migration (Priority: Urgent, Bug, L)
- <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-964/fix-referenceerror-resolvedsearchparams-not-defined-on-dashboard|DEV-964> — Fix resolvedSearchParams ReferenceError (Priority: Urgent, Bug, L)
- <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-965/investigate-nextjsturbopack-build-compilation-errors-in-brand|DEV-965> — Investigate build compilation errors (Priority: High, Bug, M)
- <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-966/fix-referenceerror-dirtyfieldscontext-not-defined-on-brand-edit-page|DEV-966> — Fix DirtyFieldsContext ReferenceError (Priority: Normal, Bug, S)
- <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-967/fix-hydration-mismatches-and-hooks-violation-on-dashboard-brand-pages|DEV-967> — Fix hydration mismatches and hooks violation (Priority: Normal, Bug, S)

Skipped 0 duplicates · 0 issues auto-resolved (not ticketed)
